name: nexus-defi-platform
description: Production-grade fullstack Web3 DeFi staking platform

scripts.contracts:deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.contracts:deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.subgraph:deploy: cd subgraph && graph deploy --node https://api.studio.thegraph.com/deploy/ nexus-defi
